name: Chip Englander
subject: Rand Paul for President Weekly Newsletter 6/21
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Rand Paul For President
body:
| | |

| | �
---
**Saturday, June 20, 2015**

Senator Paul unveiled his Fair and Flat Tax plan on Thursday, and the response was overwhelmingly positive! It's the biggest and boldest tax cut in American history -- a 14.5% flat tax that would repeal and replace the entire IRS tax code. This plan will give the U.S. economy a major boost with a projected 10% GDP increase and create nearly 2 million new jobs.

In other news, Hillary Clinton re-launched her campaign in the wake of recent polls showing her trailing Senator Paul in key battleground states. It is becoming increasingly clear that Rand Paul is the Republican candidate with the best shot at defeating Hillary Clinton and the Washington Machine. Stay tuned for the next Rand Paul for President Weekly Newsletter. More news and updates are available below.

Chip Englander
Campaign Manager
Rand Paul for President
�
�
| | |
## News of the Week
---
| | |
### Op-Ed: Rand Paul's Fair and Flat Tax
I am announcing an over $2 trillion tax cut that would repeal the entire IRS tax code - more than 70,000 pages - and replace it with a low, broad-based tax of 14.5% on individuals and businesses. I would eliminate nearly every special-interest loophole. The plan also eliminates the payroll tax on workers and several federal taxes outright, including gift and estate taxes, telephone taxes, and all duties and tariffs.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28529136:27401998363:m:1:879035888:134BFF86F119697DC541A17DF71931C6:r)
---
|
### Hundreds Pack Manchester Office To Hear Rand Paul Bash 'Arrogant Washington Machine'
At least two hundred people packed into a tiny office space in downtown Manchester to hear 2016 GOP presidential candidate Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY) bash the "Washington machine" and hammer both parties in Congress for failing to read legislation like Obamatrade before voting on it.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28529137:27401998363:m:1:879035888:134BFF86F119697DC541A17DF71931C6:r)
---
|
### Military Leaders Vindicate Rand Paul's Foreign Policy
Republican critics of a restrained foreign policy often resort to defining those who disagree with them as "anti-military." The trouble with that critique is it isn't reliably accurate. As the Washington Post recently reported, leading military strategists are presently returning to a more traditionally conservative position.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28529138:27401998363:m:1:879035888:134BFF86F119697DC541A17DF71931C6:r)
---

Dan organized a Pints for Liberty meeting with Senator Rand Paul on May 29th. Over 300 showed up to purchase books and to hear from the Senator.

name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: Did you hear? Ted Cruz is "the front runner"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the following address: http://act.tedcruz.org/index.php/email/emailWebview?mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonvazOZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4DTMVjI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D

Hello Friend,

Earlier this week, Hugh Hewitt -- a conservative talk radio host with millions of listeners -- spoke about the current state of the 2016 race for the Republican nomination for President, and you're going to want to hear what he said <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/icymi-hugh-hewitt-ted-cruz-is-the-front-runner/>:

In the interview, Hugh said that Ted is the front runner and went on to say "I actually think he’s prepared better to run the board than anybody else." And Friend, we're putting together a strong national team to do just that.

Following our rollout of leadership teams in Iowa <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-welcomes-iowa-leadership-team/>, New Hampshire <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/1386/>, South Carolina <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-welcomes-south-carolina-leadership-team/>, Nevada <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/sen-cruz-names-robert-uithoven-nevada-state-director/>, Michigan <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-announces-wendy-day-michigan-state-director/>, California <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-announces-michigan-california-state-chairs/>, Tennessee <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-names-tennessee-and-new-jersey-state-chairs/>, and New Jersey <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-names-tennessee-and-new-jersey-state-chairs/>, this week we were proud to announce our team in North Carolina <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-announces-north-carolina-leadership-team/>. Comprised of a diverse group of longtime grassroots influencers including Tea Party and evangelical leaders, civil rights and 2nd Amendment activists, a veteran and military affairs expert, and Republican Women and party leaders all across the Tarheel state, our team in North Carolina will
ensure we are competitive and have the resources we need to be successful!

This week, Ted also stole the show with his speech at the Faith & Freedom Coalition's Road to Majority Conference. It drew headlines like "Among the Faithful Conservatives, Cruz Shines" from The Weekly Standard <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-names-tennessee-and-new-jersey-state-chairs/> and "How Ted Cruz Has Already Won the Faith & Freedom Conference" from U.S. News & World Report <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/u-s-news-world-report-how-ted-cruz-has-already-won-the-faith-freedom-conference/>. If you haven't seen it yet, you're going to want to watch and share Ted's speech on the fight to defend religious liberty that has everyone raving <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=81qiGkmSwZM>.

Click to view video

Momentum is building, and we're thrilled to have you on Team Cruz in this fight -- our fight -- to reignite the promise of America!

All the best,

Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President
Press Clips

Among the Faithful Conservatives, Cruz Shines
The Weekly Standard <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/the-weekly-standard-among-the-faithful-conservatives-cruz-shines/>

Setting His Script Aside, Cruz Focuses on the Fight for Religious Liberty
National Review Online <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/national-review-online-setting-his-script-aside-cruz-focuses-on-the-fight-for-religious-liberty/>

Cruz Moves to Fine State Department for Illegally Withholding Key Iran Report
Washington Free Beacon <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/washington-free-beacon-cruz-moves-to-fine-state-department-for-illegally-withholding-key-iran-report/>

How Ted Cruz Has Already Won the Faith & Freedom Conference
U.S. News & World Report <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/u-s-news-world-report-how-ted-cruz-has-already-won-the-faith-freedom-conference/>

Clinton, Cruz top Facebook interactions for 2016 launches
Politico <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/politico-clinton-cruz-top-facebook-interactions-for-2016-launches/>

1.1 billion Twitter hits for Cruz in online rally, setting records
Washington Examiner <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/washington-examiner-1-1-billion-twitter-hits-for-cruz-in-online-rally-setting-records/>

Ted Cruz Tops Carly Fiorina in Republican Women’s Straw Poll
Breitbart <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/breitbart-ted-cruz-tops-carly-fiorina-in-republican-womens-straw-poll/>
CRUZ VIDEOS

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GVE6yOmc-Ws>

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=81qiGkmSwZM>

Courageous Conservatives

Reigniting the Promise of America

PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www.tedcruz.org <http://www.tedcruz.org>
P.O. Box 25376, Houston, TX 77265 | (713) 353-4330

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to receive these emails you may unsubscribe here: http://act.tedcruz.org/UnsubscribePage.html?mkt_unsubscribe=1&mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonvazOZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4DTMVjI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D.

name: Rand Paul
subject: ## A stake through the heart of the IRS ##
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

I'm ready to drive a stake through the heart of the IRS -- and trash all 70,000 pages of our federal government's outdated, confusing tax code.

So I've announced my Fair and Flat tax plan that I will make the centerpiece of my first term as President of the United States -- a tax plan that puts over $2 TRILLION back in Americans' pockets, creates at least 1.4 million new jobs and turbo-charges our economy in the process.

Fellow Conservative, you can already hear the shrieks and howls coming from the special interest lobby in Washington, D.C. over my announcement.

**[That's why I'm counting on you to stand with me by signing your"Fair and Flat Tax NOW!" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28542348:27411857797:m:1:879035888:17B3CF5104B549B7AE0F8BB4588464DC:r)**.

For far too long, Washington, D.C. bureaucrats and Big Government politicians have believed your money is theirs -- and they can spend it better than everyday hard-working Americans and entrepreneurs.

I disagree.

In fact, I believe if the Washington Machine's tax-and-spend policies aren't stopped, our economy will slide further down the slow-growth rut of the last decade.

That's why I'm proposing to put the Washington Machine on a much-needed diet by enacting the boldest and biggest tax cut in American history.

If passed into law, my tax plan would:

>>> End the workers tax: I will end the FICA payroll tax, the largest tax for many working Americans. It goes to zero.

>>> Eliminate the headaches and complication in filing federal taxes by allowing every taxpayer to file a simple, one-page return with a low and fair tax rate of 14.5%, saving American families over $2 TRILLION in the first 10 years;

>>> End corporate welfare and special tax breaks, eliminating the army of lobbyists and tax lawyers gaming the system. That means no more mom and pop small businesses paying 40% of their income in taxes, while big corporations -- armed with armies of slick lawyers -- pay zero;

>>> Provide a real economic stimulus to our economy by exploding the GDP by almost 10% over the first 10 years.

Fellow Conservative, if you and I want to finally restore the prosperity that should be every American's birthright, this is how we'll do it.

The truth is, Washington, D.C. doesn't have a "revenue" problem. It has a spending problem.

Just since President Obama took office, government tax revenue has hit a record shattering $3.1 trillion. Yet the Washington Machine's spending continues to push our nation deeper in debt.

As President, I will fight to cut spending with every ounce of energy in my body, including passing a Balanced Budget Amendment.

But the best thing we can do to get out of debt and balance our budget is to put more Americans back to work.

According to the nonpartisan Tax Foundation's analysis, my plan would create at least 1.4 million new jobs -- creating new wealth and tax revenue to pay down our debt.

**[Will you stand with me by signing your"Fair and Flat Tax NOW!" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28542348:27411857797:m:1:879035888:17B3CF5104B549B7AE0F8BB4588464DC:r)**?

I understand my plan is bold.

But Fellow Conservative, I'm not interested in nibbling around the edges of "reforming" Washington.

I'm running for President to flip Washington upside-down on its head and Defeat the Machine.

I proved I can do it with the support of good folks like you when I stood up to the NSA.

But now it's time to unleash prosperity in America by putting more money back in Americans' pockets -- and putting Washington on a diet.

**[So please stand with me by signing your"Fair and Flat Tax NOW" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28542348:27411857797:m:1:879035888:17B3CF5104B549B7AE0F8BB4588464DC:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, the special interest groups in Washington dependent on corporate welfare already considered me "Enemy #1."

And now that I've released a tax plan eliminating EVERY special interest loophole in our tax code, the special interest lobby is going to double-down on their smear campaign they've launched against me and my message.

But I'm not running for their approval. I'm running to take our government back.

I'm asking you to stand with me.

**[So please, sign your"Fair and Flat Tax NOW!" petition, and agree to chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help me put my tax plan in front of as many voters as possible in key early states](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28542348:27411857797:m:1:879035888:17B3CF5104B549B7AE0F8BB4588464DC:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28542349:27411857797:m:1:879035888:17B3CF5104B549B7AE0F8BB4588464DC:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28542350:27411857797:m:1:879035888:17B3CF5104B549B7AE0F8BB4588464DC:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28542351:27411857797:m:1:879035888:17B3CF5104B549B7AE0F8BB4588464DC:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28542352:27411857797:m:1:879035888:17B3CF5104B549B7AE0F8BB4588464DC:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28542348:27411857797:m:1:879035888:17B3CF5104B549B7AE0F8BB4588464DC:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28542348:27411857797:m:1:879035888:17B3CF5104B549B7AE0F8BB4588464DC:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28542353:27411857797:m:1:879035888:17B3CF5104B549B7AE0F8BB4588464DC:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28542354:27411857797:m:1:879035888:17B3CF5104B549B7AE0F8BB4588464DC:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28542355:27411857797:m:1:879035888:17B3CF5104B549B7AE0F8BB4588464DC:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

As President, I will fight to cut spending with every ounce of energy in my body, including passing a Balanced Budget Amendment. But the best thing we can do to get out of debt and balance our budget is to put more Americans back to work. According to the nonpartisan Tax Foundation's analysis, my plan would create at least 1.4 million new jobs -- creating new wealth and tax revenue to pay down our debt. ? I understand my plan is bold. But Fellow Conservative, I'm not interested in nibbling around the edges of "reforming" Washington. I'm running for President to flip Washington upside-down on its head and Defeat the Machine. I proved I can do it with the support of good folks like you when I stood up to the NSA. But now it's time to unleash prosperity in America by putting more money back in Americans' pockets -- and putting Washington on a diet. . Fellow Conservative, the special interest groups in Washington dependent on corporate welfare already considered me "Enemy #1." And now that I've released a tax plan eliminating EVERY special interest loophole in our tax code, the special interest lobby is going to double-down on their smear campaign they've launched against me and my message. But I'm not running for their approval. I'm running to take our government back. I'm asking you to stand with me. . | | In Liberty, Rand Paul Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. For more information . | mailto:unsub-27411857797-echo3-8B75F66631874D65E089F3613EFEE23F@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings **

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: A Note from Senator Graham on Charleston
body:
LindseyGraham.com

A message from Lindsey Graham

Dear Friend,

Our nation needs to come together as a whole and pray for the
victims of the tragic shooting in Charleston. This weekend, I
have been in South Carolina praying with my friends and
neighbors. I ask you to do the same.

There can be no doubt that the shooting on Wednesday night was
racially motivated and signals to all of us that the scars of our
history are still with us today. Throughout our country, we
still have much to do in the name of equality. I want to talk
about those issues on the campaign trail. I want to find ways to
bring our country together, to work with democrats and
republicans, and everyone of any racial, ethnic, religious or
political background to solve the massive challenges we face.
This is something I don't just talk about, it is something I have
done and will continue to do.

This murderer said he wanted to start a race war; he has failed
miserably. In Charleston this weekend, I saw a community coming
together. I saw people seeking solace in what they share
together, not in what makes them different.

I'm from South Carolina. My state, like our nation, has a
difficult history of race relations. We have tried to address it
through compromise and working together. There is no doubt we
have made great progress, but Charleston reminds us there is
still much to do. The shooting was a tragic event and the fact
that one person could act with such hatred and disregard for
human life sickens me. We must learn from this disaster and we
must all strive to do better in the memory of the nine victims.
Let us ensure South Carolina, and our nation, is always
represented by those nine, not by that one.

At an appropriate time, we will move forward to have a discussion
on a variety of fronts about what will make us stronger as a
nation and what solutions need to be found to achieve that goal.
But now, please join me in continuing to pray for the victims,
for the citizens of Charleston, of my home state, and of our
nation. Let's find the strength and wisdom, together, to make
sure this never happens again.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWEd5O91NI

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWEd5O91NI

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Charleston
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Friend --

As a mother, a grandmother, and a human being, my heart is bursting for the people of Charleston.

Once again, bodies are being carried out of a black church. Once again, racist rhetoric has metastasized into racist violence.

This is a history we wanted so desperately to leave behind, but we can’t hide from hard truths about race and justice in America. We have to name them, own them, and ultimately change them.

In America today, blacks are nearly three times as likely as whites to be denied a mortgage. Our schools are more segregated than they were in the 1960s. Black children are 500 percent more likely to die from asthma than white kids -- how can that be true?

We must address these issues as a nation, and we must also address them as individuals. Cruel jokes can’t go unchallenged, offhand comments about not wanting “those people” in the neighborhood can’t be ignored, and news reports about poverty and crime and discrimination can’t just evoke our sympathy -- even empathy -- they must also spur us to action and prompt us to question our own assumptions and privilege.

We have to embrace the humanity of those around us, no matter what they look like, how they worship, or who they love. Most of all, we have to teach our children to embrace that humanity, too.

As all of us reeled from the news in Charleston, a friend of mine shared his reflection on the hearts and values of those men and women at Mother Emanuel:

“A dozen people gathered to pray. They’re in their most intimate of communities and a stranger who doesn’t look or dress like them joins in. They don’t judge, they just welcome. During their last hour, nine people of faith welcomed a stranger in prayer and fellowship.”

“I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me drink, I was a stranger and you welcomed me.”

That’s humanity at its best. That’s America at its best. And that’s the spirit we need to nurture in our lives and our families and our communities.

Thank you,

Hillary

Watch Hillary's full remarks from the United States Conference of Mayors:

http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI4ODQ1NTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgxOTY4NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0

***************

PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Off to a good start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_4&n=1)
---
**Dear Friend --**
We are off to a good start, but we still need your help! Our momentum is heading in the right direction, but we have more work to do. As you know our FEC filing is due in a short _**10 days**_ _**!**_ This deadline is an increasingly important deadline as the pool of GOP contenders increases by the day. [I need your support financially](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_4&n=2) as I make a bid for the White House. It is only with your help that we can show the nation that pro-life, pro-family and pro-worker values still matter in the United States. You can [help me by joining the Guardian Program](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_4&n=3) and raise or give $100 in the next _**10 days**_. I need your help Friend. Please continue your support as we fight for conservative values in our wonderful country. Rick
[http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_4&n=4)
